docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEYER, GEORGE RAY AS TO DEFENDANT IVROC, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA TECHLINE STUDIO SAN FRANCISCO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
